tools.name: list_communities
tools.title: List Austin communities
tools.description: List luxury Austin-area communities/neighborhoods covered by Echelon Property Group, with slug, name, and price range.

query.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to filter by community name or slug.

tools.name: get_community
tools.title: Get Austin community guide
tools.description: Return the editorial overview, price range, and canonical URL for a specific Austin community by slug (e.g. westlake-hills, tarrytown).

tools.name: list_blog_posts
tools.title: List Echelon blog posts
tools.description: List published Austin luxury real estate editorial articles from Echelon Property Group, with id, title, date, and canonical URL.

query.description: Optional case-insensitive substring to filter by title or slug/id.

limit.description: Maximum number of posts to return (default 25).
